title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: A podcast discussion featuring Hyland executives and Erie Insurance's CIO explores how unstructured data is critical to successful enterprise AI deployments, particularly in agentic systems. The conversation highlights how proper use of unstructured data helps overcome failures in AI pilots and token allocation, enabling real business impact in healthcare, banking, and insurance.
writeup: This podcast brings together Hyland executives and Erie Insurance's CIO to argue that unstructured data is central to successful enterprise AI deployments, especially in agentic systems. The discussion ties proper handling of unstructured data to overcoming common failure points in AI pilots and token allocation. Concrete sectors named for real business impact include healthcare, banking, and insurance.
